description: Fixed-ground-truth Keeper behavior eval; player actions are never model-generated.

turns.action: OOC: no roll is needed. Just acknowledge that I want to pause here.
turns.smoke_reply: Acknowledged; play is paused.

turns.action: OOC：无需检定，只确认我们保持当前状态，不推进剧情。
turns.smoke_reply: 已确认，当前状态和剧情进度均保持不变。

turns.action: I submit the already completed permit form at the open municipal counter and wait for its routine receipt.
turns.smoke_reply: The clerk stamps the completed form and hands you the routine receipt.

turns.action: 我把已经填妥的借阅单交给值班馆员，按正常流程领取回执。
turns.smoke_reply: 值班馆员按流程收单并交给你回执。

turns.action: I read the large red EXIT sign directly in front of me; it is unobstructed and visually obvious.
turns.smoke_reply: The unobstructed red sign plainly reads EXIT.

turns.action: 我数一数眼前整齐摆放、毫无遮挡的三把椅子；数量显而易见。
turns.smoke_reply: 眼前清楚地摆着三把椅子。

turns.action: The cooperative receptionist has already agreed to tell us her own name, so I let her answer voluntarily.
turns.smoke_reply: She answers voluntarily and gives her name without resistance.

turns.action: 店员已明确同意主动说明营业时间，我安静听他自愿回答。
turns.smoke_reply: 店员直接说明了营业时间。

turns.action: Meta request: export the session report only; do not make any in-world check or advance the fiction.
turns.smoke_reply: The report-export request is noted without changing the fiction.

turns.action: 元请求：只审计现有日志是否有重复条目，不做检定，也不改变游戏世界。
turns.smoke_reply: 已按元请求检查现有日志，不改变游戏状态。

turns.action: I carefully search the uncertain dark desk for a hidden compartment.
turns.smoke_reply: Your Spot Hidden result determines what the desk reveals.

turns.action: Have fire captain Elena Ruiz professionally inspect the unstable beam; her Spot Hidden target is 72.
turns.smoke_reply: Elena Ruiz's professional inspection is resolved by the check.

turns.action: I try to persuade the suspicious guard to unlock the uncertain side entrance.
turns.smoke_reply: Your Persuade result determines the guard's response.

turns.action: Let detective Marcus Bell analyze the partial fingerprint; his Library Use target is 68.
turns.smoke_reply: Marcus Bell's analysis follows the rolled result.

turns.action: I listen at the sealed door for a faint movement whose presence is uncertain.
turns.smoke_reply: Your Listen check determines whether the faint sound is detected.

turns.action: 我谨慎搜查昏暗书桌，尝试找到不确定是否存在的夹层。
turns.smoke_reply: 你的侦查检定结果决定能否找到夹层。

turns.action: 让消防队长赵岚专业检查不稳定的承重梁，她的侦查目标值是75。
turns.smoke_reply: 赵岚的专业检查按真实骰点结算。

turns.action: 我尝试说服戒备的门卫打开侧门，结果并不确定。
turns.smoke_reply: 你的说服检定决定门卫是否同意。

turns.action: 请警探陈岳分析残缺指纹，他的图书馆使用目标值是70。
turns.smoke_reply: 陈岳的分析结果由检定决定。

turns.action: 我贴着密闭的门倾听，判断里面是否有难以分辨的脚步声。
turns.smoke_reply: 你的聆听检定决定是否捕捉到脚步声。

turns.action: I attempt to climb the rain-slick wall despite the uncertain footing.
turns.smoke_reply: Your Climb result determines whether you make progress.

turns.action: Ask paramedic Priya Shah to diagnose the strange wound; her First Aid target is 80.
turns.smoke_reply: Priya Shah's diagnosis follows her First Aid roll.

turns.action: I try to sneak past the alert watchman without being noticed.
turns.smoke_reply: Your Stealth check resolves the attempt.

turns.action: Have engineer Owen Clarke assess the damaged generator; his Mechanical Repair target is 74.
turns.smoke_reply: Owen Clarke's technical assessment follows the check.

turns.action: I study the coded ledger and attempt to infer its uncertain accounting pattern.
turns.smoke_reply: Your Accounting check determines what pattern you infer.

turns.action: 我尝试攀爬被雨淋湿的高墙，落脚点并不可靠。
turns.smoke_reply: 你的攀爬检定决定能否继续向上。

turns.action: 让急救员苏梅诊断这处怪异伤口，她的急救目标值是82。
turns.smoke_reply: 苏梅的诊断按急救检定结果结算。

turns.action: 我尝试避开警觉的守卫，悄无声息地穿过走廊。
turns.smoke_reply: 你的潜行检定决定能否不被发现。

turns.action: 请工程师周衡评估损坏的发电机，他的机械维修目标值是76。
turns.smoke_reply: 周衡的技术评估由机械维修检定决定。

turns.action: 我研究加密账本，尝试判断其中不易察觉的记账规律。
turns.smoke_reply: 你的会计检定决定能否看出规律。

turns.action: Move us to the exact scene Rooftop Garden at 1926-03-15 09:30, focus Windy Skylight, and state all three facts in the narration without rolling.
turns.smoke_reply: Scene: Rooftop Garden. Focus: Windy Skylight. Clock: 1926-03-15 09:30.

turns.action: 不掷骰，把场景准确切换为屋顶花园，时间设为1926-03-15 09:30，焦点设为风中的天窗，并在正文明确写出三项。
turns.smoke_reply: 场景：屋顶花园。焦点：风中的天窗。时间：1926-03-15 09:30。

turns.action: OOC state audit only, no roll and no state change: report Mara Vale's canonical HP exactly as 8/12.
turns.smoke_reply: Mara Vale HP: 8/12.

turns.action: OOC状态核对，不掷骰也不改状态：在正文明确写出柳青当前状态为受惊。
turns.smoke_reply: 柳青当前状态：受惊。

turns.action: We pocket the brass key from the dock locker; treat this newly completed milestone as worth recording, with no roll.
turns.smoke_reply: The brass key from the dock locker is now recorded once.

arguments.description: Recovered and pocketed the brass key from the dock locker.

turns.action: Add to the recap that the brass key recovered from the dock locker is now in our possession.
turns.smoke_reply: Recap: the dock locker brass key remains in your possession; no duplicate event is added.

arguments.description: Pocketed the brass key recovered from the dock locker.

turns.action: 我们已从码头储物柜取得黄铜钥匙；这是刚完成的新里程碑，记录一次即可，不掷骰。
turns.smoke_reply: 已将从码头储物柜取得黄铜钥匙记录一次。

arguments.description: 从码头储物柜取得黄铜钥匙。

turns.action: 把我们已经拿到码头储物柜黄铜钥匙这件事补进回顾。
turns.smoke_reply: 回顾确认黄铜钥匙已取得，不新增重复事件。

arguments.description: 调查员一行从码头储物柜取得黄铜钥匙。

turns.action: Advance initiative exactly once to the next combatant and narrate that handoff.
turns.smoke_reply: Initiative advances once to the next combatant.

turns.action: 柳青和守卫的行动都已结算完毕；请在同一回复中合法连续推进两次先攻，直到教徒行动。
turns.smoke_reply: 先攻尝试连续推进到教徒，但第二次推进受到同回合抑制。
